item.title: LIVE: Pres. Clinton speaks at Jesse Jackson memorial service
item.description: 24/7 coverage of breaking news and live events

item.title: Obama honors Jesse Jackson's 'legacy of hope' at a time when it's 'hard to hope'
item.description: Former Presidents Biden, Clinton and Vice President Harris also honored Jackson.

item.title: Iran live updates: US believes Russia is providing Iran intelligence, sources say
item.description: President Donald Trump called upon the Iranian Revolutionary Guard, military and police to "lay down their arms" against the U.S. and Israel.

item.title: WATCH: Nat Geo's 'Moment on the Earth' features polar bear mom and cub
item.description: National Geographic captures a tender moment between a polar bear mother and her cub in a photo by Martin Gregus Jr., as they wait for sea ice to retu...

item.title: WATCH: What to watch this weekend
item.description: ABC News' Will Ganss breaks down the new movies and shows to look out for this weekend.
